payment due from ASW:

Date: Tue, 23 May 2006 09:44:25 -0400
To: dKIESQ@aol.com
From: Peg Ugland pegu@naproperty.com
Subject: Bombadier

Darren,
The next Bombadier payment for the new aircraft for
ASW is due by
5/31/06. The payment amount is $5,000,000. ASW has
$3,874,309.71 at Bear
Stearns, and $952,438 at Merrill Lynch. Please
check with Jeffrey to see
if he wants to use some of her funds and balance
from LHW, or how he wants
to pay this.
Thanks.
Peg
